name: io.github.lacausecrypto/sports-hub
description: 32 sports API providers, 336 tools. Scores, stats, odds, esports, chess, AFL, and more.

environmentVariables.name: SPORTS_HUB_PROVIDERS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated provider names or preset (free, us-major, soccer, f1, esports, odds, cricket, golf, chess). Omit for all 32 providers.

environmentVariables.name: THE_ODDS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: The Odds API key (free at the-odds-api.com)
